goal: is_cauchy_seq(a) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { k0 <= x1 and k0 <= x2 implies a(x1).is_close(a(x2), x0) } } }
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { not k0 <= x2 or not k0 <= x3 or x0(x2).is_close(x0(x3), x1) } } } = is_cauchy_seq(x0) }(a)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and k0 <= x1 implies a(x0).is_close(a(x1), eps) } }
proof: (forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not k0 <= x1 or not k0 <= x2 or a(x1).is_close(a(x2), x0) } } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { exists(k0: Nat, k1: Nat) { x1 <= k0 and x1 <= k1 and not a(k0).is_close(a(k1), x0) } }) }(eps)

goal: cauchy_bound(a, n, eps) = forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { n <= x0 and n <= x1 implies a(x0).is_close(a(x1), eps) }
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Real) { forall(x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { not x0 <= x3 or not x0 <= x4 or x1(x3).is_close(x1(x4), x2) } = cauchy_bound(x1, x0, x2) }(n, a, eps)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Real) { forall(x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { not x0 <= x3 or not x0 <= x4 or x1(x3).is_close(x1(x4), x2) } = cauchy_bound(x1, x0, x2) }(n, a, eps)
let w0: Nat satisfy { exists(k0: Nat) { n <= w0 and n <= k0 and not a(w0).is_close(a(k0), eps) } }
let w1: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and n <= w1 and not a(w0).is_close(a(w1), eps) }
let w2: Nat satisfy { n <= w0 and n <= w2 and not a(w0).is_close(a(w2), eps) }
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not n <= x1 or a(x0).is_close(a(x1), eps) }(w0, w2)
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { cauchy_bound(x0, k0, x1) } } = converges(x0) }(a)

goal: converges(a) = forall(x0: Real) { x0.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { cauchy_bound(a, k0, x0) } }
proof: function(x0: Nat -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { cauchy_bound(x0, k0, x1) } } = converges(x0) }(a)

goal: eps.is_positive implies exists(k0: Nat) { cauchy_bound(a, k0, eps) }
proof: (forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { cauchy_bound(a, k0, x0) } } = true)
function(x0: Real) { not (x0.is_positive and forall(x1: Nat) { not cauchy_bound(a, x1, x0) }) }(eps)

goal: cauchy_bound(a, n, eps) = forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { n <= x0 and n <= x1 implies a(x0).is_close(a(x1), eps) }
proof: function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat -> Real, x2: Real) { forall(x3: Nat, x4: Nat) { not x0 <= x3 or not x0 <= x4 or x1(x3).is_close(x1(x4), x2) } = cauchy_bound(x1, x0, x2) }(n, a, eps)

goal: n <= i and n <= j implies a(i).is_close(a(j), eps)
proof: (forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not n <= x1 or a(x0).is_close(a(x1), eps) } = true)
function(x0: Nat) { forall(x1: Nat) { not n <= x0 or not n <= x1 or a(x0).is_close(a(x1), eps) } = true }(i)
function(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { not (n <= x0 and n <= x1 and not a(x0).is_close(a(x1), eps)) }(i, j)

goal: exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x0: Nat, x1: Nat) { k0 <= x0 and k0 <= x1 implies a(x0).is_close(a(x1), eps) } }
proof: function(x0: Nat) { not forall(x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not x0 <= x1 or not x0 <= x2 or a(x1).is_close(a(x2), eps) } }(n)

function(x0: Nat -> Real) { forall(x1: Real) { not x1.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x2: Nat, x3: Nat) { not k0 <= x2 or not k0 <= x3 or x0(x2).is_close(x0(x3), x1) } } } = is_cauchy_seq(x0) }(a)
(forall(x0: Real) { not x0.is_positive or exists(k0: Nat) { forall(x1: Nat, x2: Nat) { not k0 <= x1 or not k0 <= x2 or a(x1).is_close(a(x2), x0) } } } = true)
function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real) { not converges_to(x0, x1) or converges(x0) }(a, x)
function(x0: Nat -> Real) { converges(x0) = is_cauchy_seq(x0) }(a)
function(x0: Real) { not converges_to(a, x0) }(limit(a))
not is_cauchy_seq(a)
exists(k0: Real) { converges_to(a, k0) }
let w0: Real satisfy { converges_to(a, w0) }
function(x0: Nat -> Real, x1: Real) { not converges_to(x0, x1) or is_cauchy_seq(x0) }(a, w0)
